description_long: This is a modern sniper rifle featuring a long, slender barrel and a robust stock with a striking orange, black, and white camouflage pattern. The rifle is equipped with a high-magnification scope mounted on top, designed for precision shooting at long distances. The stock appears to be fixed and ergonomically shaped, with a cheek rest and a buttpad for stability and comfort. A bipod is attached near the front of the rifle, providing additional support when firing from a prone or supported position. The magazine is a detachable box type, located just in front of the trigger guard. The muzzle is fitted with a small device, likely a muzzle brake, to reduce recoil and muzzle rise during firing.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, orange-black-white camouflage, a mounted scope, bipod, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and the scope aligned above the stock.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, camouflage pattern, scope, bipod, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the camouflage pattern and bipod visible.
